ModuleTitle.helper: Internal/admin-friendly title for this content block. This is useful when editors are scanning modules on the page.

ModuleAnchor.helper: Used to create #anchor-links on the page (numbers, letters, hyphens only).

Eyebrow.helper: Short label above the heading. Keep this concise.

Image.helper: Use a tall portrait-style image when possible. Recommended minimum size: 1200px wide by 1500px high.

ImageAlt.helper: Describe the image for accessibility and SEO.

ImagePosition.helper: Choose whether the image displays on the left or right on desktop.

QuoteText.helper: Optional quote or callout displayed overlapping the image.

ShowQuoteDesktopOnly.helper: Recommended. Hides the overlapping quote card on smaller screens.
